message:
refactor(patterns): remove dead code replaced by single-pass state machine

Remove contains_unquoted(), contains_unquoted_str(), and
contains_unquoted_standalone_ampersand() helper functions.

These were superseded by the single-pass O(n) check_structure() state
machine added in commit 2886ce1. The new implementation performs all
quote-aware character/pattern detection in one traversal instead of
requiring multiple separate scans.

The old helpers:
- contains_unquoted(): ~30 lines, O(n) per character search
- contains_unquoted_str(): ~50 lines, O(n) per pattern search
- contains_unquoted_standalone_ampersand(): ~55 lines, O(n) for & detection

These were called 11+ times by the old check_structure(), making it
O(n*k) where k is the number of checks. The new state machine is O(n).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
